declared_unit: A single 400 kVA Mineral Oil Filled Transformer (including packaging) operating throughout its entire service life, which is 35 years.
modules_reported: A1, A2, A3, A4, A5, B6, C1, C2, C3, C4 (D not declared)
note: The results table reports A1, A2 and A3 in separate columns with no aggregated A1-A3 column, so the three modules were summed. GWP-total A1-A3 = 5440+83.6+288 = 5811.6; GWP-fossil = 5560+83.5+286 = 5929.5; GWP-biogenic = -120+0.0277+0.377 = -119.6; GWP-GHG = 5110+83.1+281 = 5474.1. Values are per the single transformer declared unit.
